//: scripts/ is dev/CI tooling run via tsx on the .ts source (capture:fixtures, verify:fixtures, …), never imported by src and not shipped in dist. It is excluded from the build emit so verify-fixtures.ts can consume the cross-boundary tools/fidelity diff engine (FDRS-437) without pulling those out-of-rootDir files into the emitted output. Typecheck (tsconfig.json, --noEmit) still covers scripts/.
